---
title: "Comparisons"
author: "Lei Curtis"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

INV <- read.csv("G:/Research/cod_SVs/consolidatev2/data_outputs/INV-dataset-ConsensusID_unique.csv") #Unique inversion dataset
INV.pass1 <- INV[INV$pass1==TRUE,]
  chrom1 <- INV.pass1[INV.pass1$chrom == "NC_044048.1",]
  chrom2 <- INV.pass1[INV.pass1$chrom == "NC_044049.1",]
  chrom7 <- INV.pass1[INV.pass1$chrom == "NC_044054.1",]
  chrom12 <- INV.pass1[INV.pass1$chrom == "NC_044059.1",]
PCA <- read.csv("G:/Research/cod_SVs/outputs/PCA.csv") #PCA dataset
  for(i in 1:NROW(PCA)){
     if(substr(PCA$ID[i],1,3) == "GoM"){
     PCA$ECOTYPE[i] <- "Gulf-of-Maine"
     } else if(substr(PCA$ID[i],1,3) == "Ice" & substr(PCA$ID[i],11,11) == "N"){
     PCA$ECOTYPE[i] <- "Iceland-Nonmigratory"
     } else if(substr(PCA$ID[i],1,3) == "Ice" & substr(PCA$ID[i],11,11) == "O"){
     PCA$ECOTYPE[i] <- "Iceland-Migratory"
     }}
PCA$INDIV_ECOTYPE <- paste(PCA$INDIVIDUAL, PCA$ECOTYPE, sep="_")

```

## PCA data

```{r}
chrom1.PCA <- PCA[PCA$CHROM=="NC_044048.1", c("CHROM", "INDIV_ECOTYPE", "GT", "ECOTYPE", "INDIVIDUAL")]
  chrom1.PCA$PCA_PRESENT <- ifelse(chrom1.PCA$GT!="0/0", "TRUE", "FALSE")
chrom2.PCA <- PCA[PCA$CHROM=="NC_044049.1",  c("CHROM", "INDIV_ECOTYPE", "GT", "ECOTYPE", "INDIVIDUAL")]
  chrom2.PCA$PCA_PRESENT <- ifelse(chrom2.PCA$GT!="0/0", "TRUE", "FALSE")
chrom7.PCA <- PCA[PCA$CHROM=="NC_044054.1",  c("CHROM", "INDIV_ECOTYPE", "GT", "ECOTYPE", "INDIVIDUAL")]
  chrom7.PCA$PCA_PRESENT <- ifelse(chrom7.PCA$GT!="0/0", "TRUE", "FALSE")
chrom12.PCA <- PCA[PCA$CHROM=="NC_044059.1",  c("CHROM", "INDIV_ECOTYPE", "GT", "ECOTYPE", "INDIVIDUAL")]
  chrom12.PCA$PCA_PRESENT <- ifelse(chrom12.PCA$GT!="0/0", "TRUE", "FALSE")
  
```

## SV Detector data
###Using the established criteria, determine what inversion IDs qualify as matching the PCA outputs

```{r}
##Inversion sizes within 10% of those previously reported
pca.size <- c((28292263-11299038), (4466546-481246), (26336501-16828712), (13690550-1809214)) #calculate size based on start and end locations
lostruct.size <- c((28828695-11064526), (4475015-436764), (26854568-16120084), (17892869-290637)) #calculate size based on start and end locations

###Chrom1
chrom1$Size_Pass <- ((chrom1$maxSize)/pca.size[1]) >=0.5 & ((chrom1$maxSize)/pca.size[1])<=1.5 | ((chrom1$maxSize)/lostruct.size[1]) >=0.5 & ((chrom1$maxSize)/lostruct.size[1])<=1.5
    print(chrom1[chrom1$Size_Pass=="TRUE", "ConsensusID"]) #IDs of consensus inversions that align with the size criteria
###Chrom2
chrom2$Size_Pass <- ((chrom2$maxSize)/pca.size[2]) >=0.5 & ((chrom2$maxSize)/pca.size[2])<=1.5 | ((chrom2$maxSize)/lostruct.size[2]) >=0.5 & ((chrom2$maxSize)/lostruct.size[2])<=1.5
    print(chrom2[chrom2$Size_Pass=="TRUE", "ConsensusID"]) #IDs of consensus inversions that align with the size criteria
###Chrom7
chrom7$Size_Pass <- ((chrom7$maxSize)/pca.size[3]) >=0.5 & ((chrom7$maxSize)/pca.size[3])<=1.5 | ((chrom7$maxSize)/lostruct.size[3]) >=0.5 & ((chrom7$maxSize)/lostruct.size[3])<=1.5
    print(chrom7[chrom7$Size_Pass=="TRUE", "ConsensusID"])
###Chrom12
chrom12$Size_Pass <- ((chrom12$maxSize)/pca.size[4]) >=0.5 & ((chrom12$maxSize)/pca.size[4])<=1.5 | ((chrom12$maxSize)/lostruct.size[4]) >=0.5 & ((chrom12$maxSize)/lostruct.size[4])<=1.5
    print(chrom12[chrom12$Size_Pass=="TRUE", "ConsensusID"])  
    
    
    
     ###Chrom1 Partial INVs
  # chrom1$INV1_Size_Pass <- (chrom1$invSizeMax <= ((17790000-9966000)+((17790000-9966000)*0.1)) & chrom1$invSizeMax >= ((17790000-9966000)-((17790000-9966000)*0.1))) | (INV.chrom1$invSizeMax <= ((18425009-10782691)+((18425009-10782691)*0.1)) & INV.chrom1$invSizeMax >= ((18425009-10782691)-((18425009-10782691)*0.1)))
  #   print(INV.chrom1[INV.chrom1$INV1_Size_Pass=="TRUE", "InversionID"])
  # INV.chrom1$INV2_Size_Pass <- (INV.chrom1$invSizeMax <= ((27341000-17790000)+((27341000-17790000)*0.1)) & INV.chrom1$invSizeMax >= ((27341000-17790000)-((27341000-17790000)*0.1))) | (INV.chrom1$invSizeMax <= ((28228130-18425009)+((28228130-18425009)*0.1)) & INV.chrom1$invSizeMax >= ((28228130-18425009)-((28228130-18425009)*0.1)))
  # print(INV.chrom1[INV.chrom1$INV2_Size_Pass=="TRUE", "InversionID"])


```



```{r}
##Inversion locations overlap by >70%
pca.start <- c(11299038, 481246, 16828712, 1809214)
lostruct.start <- c(11064526, 436764, 16120084, 290637)
pca.end <- c(28292263, 4466546, 26336501, 13690550)
lostruct.end <- c(28828695, 4475015, 26854568, 17892869)

###Chrom 1
chrom1$Location_Pass <- abs((pca.end[1]-pca.start[1])/(pmin(chrom1$start_minus_CI_group,pca.start[1])-pmax(chrom1$end_plus_CI_group,pca.end[1])))>=0.7 | abs((lostruct.end[1]-lostruct.start[1])/(pmin(chrom1$start_minus_CI_group,lostruct.start[1])-pmax(chrom1$end_plus_CI_group,lostruct.end[1])))>=0.7
###Chrom 2
chrom2$Location_Pass <- abs((pca.end[2]-pca.start[2])/(pmin(chrom2$start_minus_CI_group,pca.start[2])-pmax(chrom2$end_plus_CI_group,pca.end[2])))>=0.7 | abs((lostruct.end[2]-lostruct.start[2])/(pmin(chrom2$start_minus_CI_group,lostruct.start[2])-pmax(chrom2$end_plus_CI_group,lostruct.end[2])))>=0.7
###Chrom 7
chrom7$Location_Pass <- abs((pca.end[3]-pca.start[3])/(pmin(chrom7$start_minus_CI_group,pca.start[3])-pmax(chrom7$end_plus_CI_group,pca.end[3])))>=0.7 | abs((lostruct.end[3]-lostruct.start[3])/(pmin(chrom7$start_minus_CI_group,lostruct.start[3])-pmax(chrom7$end_plus_CI_group,lostruct.end[3])))>=0.7
###Chrom 12
chrom12$Location_Pass <- abs((pca.end[4]-pca.start[4])/(pmin(chrom12$start_minus_CI_group,pca.start[4])-pmax(chrom12$end_plus_CI_group,pca.end[4])))>=0.7 | abs((lostruct.end[4]-lostruct.start[4])/(pmin(chrom12$start_minus_CI_group,lostruct.start[4])-pmax(chrom12$end_plus_CI_group,lostruct.end[4])))>=0.7



  ###Chrom 1 Partial INVs
  # INV.chrom1$INV1_Location_Pass <- abs((INV.chrom1$window_EndUpperCI-INV.chrom1$window_StartLowerCI)/(pmin(INV.chrom1$window_StartLowerCI,9966000)-pmax(INV.chrom1$window_EndUpperCI,17790000)))>=0.7 |
  #   abs((INV.chrom1$window_EndUpperCI-INV.chrom1$window_StartLowerCI)/(pmin(INV.chrom1$window_StartLowerCI,10782691)-pmax(INV.chrom1$window_EndUpperCI,18425009)))>=0.7
  # INV.chrom1$INV2_Location_Pass <- abs((INV.chrom1$window_EndUpperCI-INV.chrom1$window_StartLowerCI)/(pmin(INV.chrom1$window_StartLowerCI,17790000)-pmax(INV.chrom1$window_EndUpperCI,27341000)))>=0.7 |
  #   abs((INV.chrom1$window_EndUpperCI-INV.chrom1$window_StartLowerCI)/(pmin(INV.chrom1$window_StartLowerCI,18425009)-pmax(INV.chrom1$window_EndUpperCI,28228130)))>=0.7
```

```{r}
##Print the inversion IDs where both conditions are true

###Chrom 1
chrom1$SV_Det <- chrom1$Size_Pass=="TRUE" & chrom1$Location_Pass=="TRUE"
###Chrom 2
chrom2$SV_Det <- chrom2$Size_Pass=="TRUE" & chrom2$Location_Pass=="TRUE"
###Chrom 7
chrom7$SV_Det <- chrom7$Size_Pass=="TRUE" & chrom7$Location_Pass=="TRUE"
###Chrom 12
chrom12$SV_Det <- chrom12$Size_Pass=="TRUE" & chrom12$Location_Pass=="TRUE"


#INV1a and 1b
# print(INV.chrom1[INV.chrom1$INV1_Size_Pass=="TRUE" & INV.chrom1$INV1_Location_Pass=="TRUE", "InversionID"])
# print(INV.chrom1[INV.chrom1$INV2_Size_Pass=="TRUE" & INV.chrom1$INV2_Location_Pass=="TRUE", "InversionID"])
```

## Identify individuals with the validated Inversion IDs

```{r}
INVind <- read.csv("G:/Research/cod_SVs/consolidatev2/data_outputs/INV-dataset-ConsensusID-Ind-Filtered.csv")
  chrom1.INVind <- INVind[INVind$chrom == "NC_044048.1", c("ConsensusID", "samp_full", "pop.names", "INDIVIDUAL", "chrom", "LG1cluster_nameB")]
  chrom2.INVind <- INVind[INVind$chrom == "NC_044049.1",c("ConsensusID", "samp_full", "pop.names", "INDIVIDUAL", "chrom", "LG2cluster_nameB")]
  chrom7.INVind <- INVind[INVind$chrom == "NC_044054.1",c("ConsensusID", "samp_full", "pop.names", "INDIVIDUAL", "chrom", "LG7cluster_nameB")]
  chrom12.INVind <- INVind[INVind$chrom == "NC_044059.1",c("ConsensusID", "samp_full", "pop.names", "INDIVIDUAL", "chrom", "LG12cluster_nameB")]
  
###Chrom1
chrom1.INVind <- left_join(chrom1.INVind, chrom1.PCA, by=join_by("chrom"=="CHROM", "samp_full"=="INDIVIDUAL"))
chrom1.INVind <- left_join(chrom1.INVind, chrom1[,c("ConsensusID", "Size_Pass", "Location_Pass", "SV_Det")], by=join_by("ConsensusID"))
chrom1.INVind$PCA_Match <- chrom1.INVind$PCA_PRESENT=="TRUE" & chrom1.INVind$SV_Det=="TRUE"

###Chrom2
####Add a column indicating if the individual has the inversion in the PCA data
chrom2.INVind <- left_join(chrom2.INVind, chrom2.PCA, by=join_by("chrom"=="CHROM", "samp_full"=="INDIVIDUAL"))
chrom2.INVind <- left_join(chrom2.INVind, chrom2[,c("ConsensusID", "Size_Pass", "Location_Pass", "SV_Det")], by=join_by("ConsensusID"))
chrom2.INVind$PCA_Match <- chrom2.INVind$PCA_PRESENT=="TRUE" & chrom2.INVind$SV_Det=="TRUE"

###Chrom7
chrom7.INVind <- left_join(chrom7.INVind, chrom7.PCA, by=join_by("chrom"=="CHROM", "samp_full"=="INDIVIDUAL"))
chrom7.INVind <- left_join(chrom7.INVind, chrom7[,c("ConsensusID", "Size_Pass", "Location_Pass", "SV_Det")], by=join_by("ConsensusID"))
chrom7.INVind$PCA_Match <- chrom7.INVind$PCA_PRESENT=="TRUE" & chrom7.INVind$SV_Det=="TRUE"

###Chrom12
chrom12.INVind <- left_join(chrom12.INVind, chrom12.PCA, by=join_by("chrom"=="CHROM", "samp_full"=="INDIVIDUAL"))
chrom12.INVind <- left_join(chrom12.INVind, chrom12[,c("ConsensusID", "Size_Pass", "Location_Pass", "SV_Det")], by=join_by("ConsensusID"))
chrom12.INVind$PCA_Match <- chrom12.INVind$PCA_PRESENT=="TRUE" & chrom12.INVind$SV_Det=="TRUE"


  ###Chrom 1 Partial INVs
# INV.indiv.chrom1$INV1_ID_PASS <- INV.indiv.chrom1$InversionID=='339-500'
# INV.indiv.chrom1$INV2_ID_PASS <- INV.indiv.chrom1$InversionID=='571-763' | 
#   INV.indiv.chrom1$InversionID=='571-768' | 
#   INV.indiv.chrom1$InversionID=='571-777'
```


##Main Manuscript figure



## Supplementary Figure

###Chrom 1

```{r}
chrom1.plot <- na.omit(data.frame(ecotype=chrom1.PCA$ECOTYPE, indiv=chrom1.PCA$INDIVIDUAL, PCA=chrom1.PCA$PCA_PRESENT))



for (i in 1:nrow(chrom1.plot)) {
  indiv.data <- chrom1.INVind[chrom1.INVind$samp_full==chrom1.plot$indiv[i], c("samp_full", "PCA_PRESENT", "SV_Det", "PCA_Match")]
  
  if(sum(indiv.data$SV_Det)>=1) {
    chrom1.plot$sv.plot[i] <- "INV Detected"
    } else if(sum(indiv.data$SV_Det)==0){
    chrom1.plot$sv.plot[i] <- "No INV Detected"
  }
}

Chrom1.Cont <-as.data.frame(table(Ecotype=INV.indiv.subset.chrom1$ecotype, SV=INV.indiv.subset.chrom1$sv.plot, PCA=INV.indiv.subset.chrom1$PCA))
Expected <- read.csv("Conceptual Figure of Results - Chrom 1.csv")


##Gulf of Maine
GOMdata <- Chrom1.Cont[Chrom1.Cont$Ecotype=="Gulf-of-Maine",c("SV", "PCA", "Freq")]
GOMexpected <- Expected[Expected$Ecotype=="Gulf-of-Maine",c("SV", "PCA", "Freq")]

ggplot(GOMdata, aes(x = PCA, y = Freq, fill = SV)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity")+
  labs(title = "Gulf of Maine Chromosome 1 Structural Variant Detection Results", x = "PCA", y = "Freq") +
  theme_classic(base_size=12)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#0288ff", "#233c74"))
ggplot(GOMexpected, aes(x = PCA, y = Freq, fill = SV)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity")+
  labs(title = "Expected Gulf of Maine Chromosome 1", x = "PCA", y = "Freq") +
  theme_classic(base_size=12)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#0288ff", "#233c74"))

##Iceland Migratory
IceMigdata <- Chrom1.Cont[Chrom1.Cont$Ecotype=="Iceland-Migratory",c("SV", "PCA", "Freq")]
IceMigexpected <- Expected[Expected$Ecotype=="Iceland-Migratory",c("SV", "PCA", "Freq")]

ggplot(IceMigdata, aes(x = PCA, y = Freq, fill = SV)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity")+
  labs(title = "Iceland Migratory Chromosome 1 Structural Variant Detection Results", x = "PCA", y = "Freq") +
  theme_classic(base_size=12)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#0288ff", "#233c74"))
ggplot(IceMigexpected, aes(x = PCA, y = Freq, fill = SV)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity")+
  labs(title = "Expected Iceland Migratory Chromosome 1", x = "PCA", y = "Freq") +
  theme_classic(base_size=12)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#0288ff", "#233c74"))

##Iceland Non-Migratory
IceNonmigdata <- Chrom1.Cont[Chrom1.Cont$Ecotype=="Iceland-Nonmigratory",c("SV", "PCA", "Freq")]
IceNonmigexpected <- Expected[Expected$Ecotype=="Iceland-Nonmigratory",c("SV", "PCA", "Freq")]

ggplot(IceNonmigdata, aes(x = PCA, y = Freq, fill = SV)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Iceland Nonmigratory Chromosome 1 Structural Variant Detection Results", x = "PCA", y = "Freq") +
  theme_classic(base_size=12)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#0288ff","#ffa31a"))
ggplot(IceNonmigexpected, aes(x = PCA, y = Freq, fill = SV)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Expected Iceland Nonmigratory Chromosome 1", x = "PCA", y = "Freq") +
  theme_classic(base_size=12)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#0288ff","#ffa31a"))


```
